title: justicia boliviana subsp. subintegrifolia
intro: Justicia boliviana subsp. subintegrifolia, also known as the Bolivian bugloss, is a plant species that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Justicia boliviana subsp. subintegrifolia include its potential to treat coughs, colds, and flu, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat various ailments.
